title: stachys × burrii
intro: Stachys × burrii, also known as Wood Betony, is a hybrid plant species belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and native to Europe. The medicinal properties of Stachys × burrii lie in its ability to reduce fever and inflammation, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of colds and flu. Stachys × burrii can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
